rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Issuance Of Protective Order Against Deposition Notice And Requests For Admissions (Set Two), Special Interrogatories (Set Two), Form Interrogatories (Set Two) And Requests For Production (Set Two) Serve Upon Pltff By Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 13, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA's Motion For Issuance Of Protective Order Against Deposition Notice And Requests For Admissions (Set Two), Special Interrogatories (Set Two), Form Interrogatories (Set Two) And Requests For Production (Set Two) Serve Upon Plaintiff By Defendant Continued to January 15, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than January 13, 2014 by 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)
